input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Zuph has a direct effect on rixq and xevu. Rixq has a direct effect on xevu. The overall probability of rixq is 32%. The probability of not rixq and xevu is 35%. The probability of rixq and xevu is 21%. Is the chance of xevu smaller when observing rixq?
